testcase.name: test_valid_weight_creates

failure.message: AssertionError: {'base_price': 79.35, 'breakdown': {'actual_weight_kg': 250.0, 'base_fee': 12.0, 'chargeable_basis': 'actual', 'chargeable_weight': 250.0, ...}, 'distance_km': 28.61, 'dropoff_otp': '8120', ...} assert None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95bc9652a80>('id') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95bc9652a80> = (None or {'base_price': 79.35, 'breakdown': {'actual_weight_kg': 250.0, 'base_fee': 12.0, 'chargeable_basis': 'actual', 'chargeable_weight': 250.0, ...}, 'distance_km': 28.61, 'dropoff_otp': '8120', ...}).get + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95bc9652a80>('order') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95bc9652a80> = {'base_price': 79.35, 'breakdown': {'actual_weight_kg': 250.0, 'base_fee': 12.0, 'chargeable_basis': 'actual', 'chargeable_weight': 250.0, ...}, 'distance_km': 28.61, 'dropoff_otp': '8120', ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter45_weight_bank_webhook.py:104: in test_valid_weight_creates assert (body.get("order") or body).get("id"), body E AssertionError: {'base_price': 79.35, 'breakdown': {'actual_weight_kg': 250.0, 'base_fee': 12.0, 'chargeable_basis': 'actual', 'chargeable_weight': 250.0, ...}, 'distance_km': 28.61, 'dropoff_otp': '8120', ...} E assert None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95bc9652a80>('id') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95bc9652a80> = (None or {'base_price': 79.35, 'breakdown': {'actual_weight_kg': 250.0, 'base_fee': 12.0, 'chargeable_basis': 'actual', 'chargeable_weight': 250.0, ...}, 'distance_km': 28.61, 'dropoff_otp': '8120', ...}).get E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95bc9652a80>('order') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95bc9652a80> = {'base_price': 79.35, 'breakdown': {'actual_weight_kg': 250.0, 'base_fee': 12.0, 'chargeable_basis': 'actual', 'chargeable_weight': 250.0, ...}, 'distance_km': 28.61, 'dropoff_otp': '8120', ...}.get
